summary: Sales Dashboard V217 Upgrade Testing Complete. All backend and frontend features verified. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components, data-testids, and interactions verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Dashboard V2 upgrade fully tested. All new features working: commission_summary (Expected/Pending/Paid), pipeline with values per stage, 3 trend charts (pipeline, deals, commission), today_actions section. Login endpoint is /api/auth/login (not /api/staff/login).

response_fields.kpis: PASS - contains today_orders, today_revenue, month_orders, month_revenue, pipeline_value, total_earned, pending_payout, conversion_rate

pipeline.stage_counts: PASS - new_leads, contacted, quoted, approved, paid, fulfilled
pipeline.values: PASS - sub-object with per-stage monetary values

response_fields.today_actions: PASS - array with type, urgency, title, description fields

charts.pipeline_trend: PASS - 6 monthly entries with month, value
charts.deals_closed_trend: PASS - 6 monthly entries with month, count, value
charts.commission_trend: PASS - 6 monthly entries with month, amount

response_fields.recent_orders: PASS - array with commission_amount, commission_status fields

frontend_ui.dom_order: PASS - Today's Actions (top: 297) appears ABOVE Pipeline (top: 523)
frontend_ui.tzs_formatting: PASS - KPI cards show TZS formatted values (e.g., 'TZS 2.6M')
frontend_ui.pipeline_values: PASS - Pipeline stages show monetary values (e.g., 'TZS 616K' for Paid stage)
frontend_ui.pipeline_clickable: PASS - All 6 pipeline stages are wrapped in <a> tags linking to /staff/orders
frontend_ui.commission_table: PASS - Shows Order, Customer, Order Total, Your Commission, Status columns
frontend_ui.trend_charts: PASS - 3 charts rendered: Pipeline Value (Area), Deals Closed (Bar), Commission Trend (Line)
frontend_ui.content_to_share: PASS - Shows promotion cards with Copy buttons and closing scripts
